auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Gitea personal access token. Create it in User Settings > Applications > Manage Access Tokens on your Gitea instance, as documented at https://docs.gitea.com/development/api-usage

extraFields.label: Base URL
extraFields.description: Gitea instance base URL, such as https://gitea.com or your self-hosted domain. URLs ending in /api/v1 are also accepted.

actions.name: create_issue
actions.description: Create an issue in a Gitea repository.

assignees.description: Usernames to assign to the issue.

labelIds.description: Label IDs to attach to the issue.

milestoneId.description: Milestone ID to attach to the issue.

ref.description: Git reference associated with the issue.

dueDate.description: Issue deadline in RFC 3339 format. Gitea only uses the date component.

closed.description: Whether the issue should be created in the closed state.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the issue.

comments.description: Number of comments on the issue.

anyOf.description: Timestamp when the issue was closed.
Git reference associated with the issue.

full_name.description: Full display name of the user.

email.description: Email address of the user when visible.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the user profile.

website.description: Website configured on the user profile.

description.description: Profile description or bio of the user.

visibility.description: Visibility setting of the user profile.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is a site administrator.

restricted.description: Whether the user account is restricted.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

actions.name: list_my_repositories
actions.description: List repositories owned by the authenticated Gitea user.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

full_name.description: Full repository name including owner.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the repository.

clone_url.description: HTTPS clone URL of the repository.

ssh_url.description: SSH clone URL of the repository.

full_name.description: Full display name of the user.

email.description: Email address of the user when visible.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the user profile.

website.description: Website configured on the user profile.

description.description: Profile description or bio of the user.

visibility.description: Visibility setting of the user profile.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is a site administrator.

restricted.description: Whether the user account is restricted.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

fork.description: Whether the repository is a fork.

mirror.description: Whether the repository is a mirror.

total_count.description: Total number of matching repositories from the x-total-count header when available.

outputSchema.description: A paginated list of Gitea repositories.

actions.name: list_repository_issues
actions.description: List issues in a Gitea repository. Pull requests are filtered out.

labels.description: Label names or IDs used to filter issues.

query.description: Search string used to filter issues.

milestones.description: Milestone names or IDs used to filter issues.

createdBy.description: Only return issues created by this username.

assignedBy.description: Only return issues assigned to this username.

mentionedBy.description: Only return issues mentioning this username.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the issue.

comments.description: Number of comments on the issue.

anyOf.description: Timestamp when the issue was closed.
Git reference associated with the issue.

actions.name: search_repositories
actions.description: Search Gitea repositories by keyword with optional repository filters.

topic.description: Whether to limit the keyword search to repository topics.

includeDescription.description: Whether the keyword should also search repository descriptions.

ownerId.description: Only search repositories owned by or contributed to by this user ID.

priorityOwnerId.description: Repository owner ID to prioritize in the results.

teamId.description: Only search repositories that belong to this team ID.

starredByUserId.description: Only search repositories starred by this user ID.

private.description: Whether private repositories accessible to the token should be included.

template.description: Whether template repositories accessible to the token should be included.

archived.description: Whether archived repositories should be included.

exclusive.description: When ownerId is set, whether to restrict results to repositories the user owns.

sort.description: Sort field used by the repository search endpoint.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

full_name.description: Full repository name including owner.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the repository.

clone_url.description: HTTPS clone URL of the repository.

ssh_url.description: SSH clone URL of the repository.

full_name.description: Full display name of the user.

email.description: Email address of the user when visible.

html_url.description: HTML URL of the user profile.

website.description: Website configured on the user profile.

description.description: Profile description or bio of the user.

visibility.description: Visibility setting of the user profile.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is a site administrator.

restricted.description: Whether the user account is restricted.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

fork.description: Whether the repository is a fork.

mirror.description: Whether the repository is a mirror.

total_count.description: Total number of matching repositories from the x-total-count header when available.
